items.description: At least one evidence_review artifact is available for checklist scoring.
items.pass_criteria: An evidence_review artifact is linked into the evaluated report or run.
items.remediation_guidance: Materialize an evidence_review artifact before finalizing literature-grounded outputs.
items.rationale: Found 1 evidence_review artifact; required at least 1.

items.description: Each linked evidence review records the explicit review question.
items.pass_criteria: evidence_review.review_question is present in each checked evidence_review artifact.
items.remediation_guidance: Record the exact literature review question in every evidence_review artifact.
items.rationale: Field 'review_question' was present in 1 of 1 checked source records.

items.description: Each linked evidence review records at least one included evidence artifact.
items.pass_criteria: evidence_review.evidence_included contains at least one entry in each checked evidence_review artifact.
items.remediation_guidance: Link at least one included evidence artifact into each evidence_review before publication.
items.rationale: List field 'evidence_included' met the minimum length in 1 of 1 checked source records.

items.description: Each linked evidence review records at least one limitation.
items.pass_criteria: evidence_review.limitations contains at least one entry in each checked evidence_review artifact.
items.remediation_guidance: Record at least one evidence limitation so downstream users can assess scope and uncertainty.
items.rationale: List field 'limitations' met the minimum length in 1 of 1 checked source records.

items.description: At least one linked evidence review preserves a structured exclusion log.
items.pass_criteria: evidence_review.evidence_excluded contains at least one entry in at least one checked evidence_review artifact.
items.remediation_guidance: Record excluded evidence items and reasons so screening decisions remain inspectable.
items.rationale: List field 'evidence_excluded' met the minimum length in 1 of 1 checked source records.
